scripts.build: npm run preclean && esbuild api/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=es2022 --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.js --external:better-sqlite3 --external:playwright --external:playwright-core --external:child_process --external:cross-spawn && npm run build:ui && npm run build:mcp
scripts.build:ui: cd ui && npm install --silent && npx vue-tsc --noEmit && npx vite build && cd .. && node -e "const{existsSync,mkdirSync,copyFileSync,readdirSync}=require('fs');const{join}=require('path');const sd='api/static';const dd='ui/dist';mkdirSync(sd,{recursive:true});const walk=(d,p='')=>{for(const e of readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const r=join(p,e.name);if(e.isDirectory()){mkdirSync(join(sd,r),{recursive:true});walk(join(d,e.name),r)}else{copyFileSync(join(d,e.name),join(sd,r))}}};walk(dd);console.log('[build] ui copied to api/static')"
scripts.build:mcp: esbuild tools/douyin-mcp/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=es2022 --format=esm --outfile=tools/douyin-mcp/dist/server.js --external:playwright --external:playwright-core && esbuild tools/gaoshi-mcp/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=es2022 --format=esm --outfile=tools/gaoshi-mcp/dist/server.js --external:better-sqlite3 --external:playwright --external:playwright-core && esbuild tools/bilibili-mcp/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=es2022 --format=esm --outfile=tools/bilibili-mcp/dist/server.js --external:playwright --external:playwright-core && esbuild tools/xiaohongshu-mcp/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=es2022 --format=esm --outfile=tools/xiaohongshu-mcp/dist/server.js --external:playwright --external:playwright-core
